title: PM Domain Implementation-Ready Schema Spec
objective: Produce the implementation-ready PM/work handoff bundle that resolves or explicitly defers remaining design decisions, locks naming, defines the DDL-ready schema specification, and establishes the validation plan and SQL write scope required before SQL authoring begins.
constrained_outputs: Unresolved decision list with explicit resolve-or-defer rulings under c:/APEX Platform/Platform-Authority
Validation plan for the first SQL authoring pass under c:/APEX Platform/Platform-Authority
SQL write-scope definition for the first SQL authoring pass under c:/APEX Platform/Platform-Authority
validation_steps: Confirm the packet output bundle satisfies all four Stage 4 artifacts required by the PM finalization protocol
Confirm every unresolved item from packet 005 is either resolved or explicitly deferred with proceed-without/add-later language
Confirm the table naming decision is locked and reflected consistently throughout the implementation-ready schema spec
Confirm SQL remains disallowed during this packet even though the packet may earn implementation-ready classification if accepted
sql_permission_note: SQL authoring is NOT permitted during packet 006 execution. The implementation-ready classification authorizes a future SQL authoring packet (007+) to begin, subject to the validation plan and write-scope definition produced here.
